name: 56 - D-0025-L Live classifier mapping preview TEST SAFE

parameters.content:
D-0025-L TEST SAFE — inactive, manual, live classifier + Decision Packet preview only.

Configure in n8n UI before run:
1) Replace **CONFIGURE_CLASSIFIER_CLASSIFY_URL_IN_N8N_UI** with classifier POST /classify URL
2) Replace **CONFIGURE_CLASSIFIER_TOKEN_IN_N8N_UI** with X-Classifier-Token value
3) Keep workflow INACTIVE — Manual Trigger only

No Telegram, no webhook, no schedule, no Funnel, no Data Table, no GitHub write, no wf40/41/42 mutation, no PM-34 unlock.

Chain: Manual Trigger -> Build classifier test event -> HTTP POST classify -> Validate fail-closed -> Build Decision Packet preview -> Inspect preview output.
